home.title: Find the right events and get notified when they matter.
home.subtitle: Browse concerts, conferences, workshops, business forums, sports, culture, and premium experiences across Cameroon.
home.featuredCategoriesDescription: Explore popular experiences and event types.
home.upcomingEventsDescription: Explore published events from the platform.
home.providerTitle: Ready to take your events to the next level?
home.providerText: Create events, manage attendees, sell tickets, and track performance from your organizer dashboard.

auth.signInDescription: Access your dashboard, tickets, notifications, and event tools.
auth.registerTitle: How do you want to start?
auth.registerDescription: Choose your account type, then complete your profile.
auth.loginHeadline: Sign in and continue your event journey.
auth.loginPanelDescription: Access your dashboard, tickets, notifications, and event tools.
auth.safeResetMessage: If an account exists for this email, a password reset link has been sent.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we will send password reset instructions if an account exists.
auth.passwordResetDescription: Use the reset link from your email. The link must include a token.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password reset successfully. You can now return to login.
auth.emailRequired: Email is required. Use the reset link from your email.
auth.resetTokenRequired: Reset token is required. Use the reset link from your email.
auth.invalidEmailMessage: Please enter a valid email address and try again.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Please check your inbox and click the verification link. In mock mode, you can simulate resending the email.
auth.verificationEmailResent: Verification email resent in mock mode.
auth.chooseAccountType: Please choose how you want to use the platform.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.passwordLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
auth.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.

eventAction.title: Event actions
eventAction.interestedDescription: Login or create an account to bookmark this event, register, and receive notifications.
eventAction.userRoleInfo: Registration, bookmarks, and user reports are available only for registered user accounts. Your current role is {{role}}.
eventAction.registeredMessage: You are registered for this event. Ticket number: {{ticketNumber}}
eventAction.registrationCancelled: This event was previously cancelled by the platform. You can register again now that it is available.
eventAction.paymentRequired: Payment is required to complete this registration.
eventAction.reportSubmittedReview: Report submitted successfully. Our moderation team will review it.

event.bookmarkSignInInfo: Sign in as an attendee to bookmark events.

feedbackPage.title: Help us improve
feedbackPage.description: Tell us what works, what feels confusing, and what would make the platform better for you.
feedbackPage.highlightDescription: Your feedback helps us prioritize improvements that matter to real users.

browse.title: Browse events made for you.
browse.description: Find conferences, concerts, workshops, sports, culture, business events and more. Use filters to discover the right event faster.
browse.emptyMessage: Try changing your search filters or check again later for new events.

details.notFoundMessage: The event you are looking for does not exist.
details.shareFailed: Unable to share event right now.

create.title: Create Event
create.description: Add the essential details, photos and schedule. Save a draft or submit when ready for review.

edit.notFoundMessage: The event may have been deleted or does not belong to this organizer.
edit.title: Update your event details
edit.description: Make quick changes to your event page and publish an updated listing.
edit.pageDescription: Update {{title}}. Manage the cover photo and existing gallery without leaving this page.

dashboard.title: My Events
dashboard.description: Create, edit and monitor all your events from one place.
dashboard.emptyMessage: Create your first event to start managing registrations and statistics.
dashboard.deleteMessage: Delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

organizer.publishingNote: Publishing and rejection are handled by administrators.

sections.photosDescription: Images are compressed before upload where possible. Gallery limit: {{limit}} images.

eventForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the experience, audience, program and benefits.
eventForm.endDateHelper: Optional, but recommended for longer events.
eventForm.coverImageDescription: Appears on event cards and details. Replaces the current cover.
eventForm.galleryImagesDescription: Add up to {{remaining}} more gallery images.
eventForm.galleryReady: {{count}} new gallery image ready for upload.
eventForm.galleryReady_plural: {{count}} new gallery images ready for upload.

errors.invalidDateRange: End date must be after start date.
errors.saveFailed: Unable to save event. Please try again.
errors.sourceImageSize: Each source image must be {{size}}MB or smaller.
errors.galleryCount: You can add {{remaining}} more gallery image{{remaining, plural, one {} other {s}}}. Maximum is {{max}}.
errors.compressedImageSize: After compression, each image must be {{size}}MB or smaller. Please choose a smaller image.
errors.coverRequired: Please upload or choose a cover photo.

report.title: Report event
report.detailsPlaceholder: Add helpful details for the moderation team.

publicNotifications.title: Platform announcements
publicNotifications.description: Stay informed about important updates, maintenance notices, and platform-wide news.
publicNotifications.emptyMessage: There are no public announcements at the moment.

footer.description: Mboko Events 237 helps attendees and organizers find events, manage registrations, and stay informed.

about.heading: A smarter way to discover and manage events.
about.description: Mboko Events 237 connects attendees and organizers through personalized discovery, digital tickets, notifications and reliable event management.
about.pillar1Text: Find events by interests, location, date, price and activity signals.
about.pillar2Text: Receive updates when events match your interests or when registrations change.
about.pillar3Text: Register, pay when needed, and keep event tickets in one place.
about.whyTitle: More than an event listing website.
about.whyText: The platform is designed around discovery and action: users choose interests, organizers publish events, and the system notifies the right audience when something relevant happens.
about.builtForSubtitle: Each experience is focused on what that user needs to do.
about.audience1Text: Discover events, choose interests, bookmark events, register, pay and manage tickets.
about.audience2Text: Create events, upload images, manage attendees, review statistics and grow your audience.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Control your account preferences, language, notifications and security.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language you prefer for your account.
settings.notificationDescription: Choose what you want to receive and how you want to receive it.
settings.securityDescription: Update your password and keep your account protected.
